name: Magic!
description:
'''Magic!''' (stylized in all uppercase) is a Canadian [[reggae fusion]] band from [[Toronto]]. Based in [[Los Angeles]], the band comprises lead vocalist/guitarist/producer [[Nasri (musician)|Nasri Atweh]], guitarist/keyboardist [[Mark "Pelli" Pellizzer]], and bassist [[Ben Spivak]]. Active since 2012, the band is signed with Latium, [[Sony Music Entertainment|Sony]], and [[RCA Records]], releasing their debut studio album ''[[Don't Kill the Magic]]'' in 2014, their second studio album ''[[Primary Colours (Magic! album)|Primary Colours]]'' in 2016, and their third studio album ''Expectations'' in 2018. They are best known for their hit single "[[Rude (song)|Rude]]", which charted at No. 1 in several countries worldwide, including the US and UK.

The band is heavily inspired by [[the Police]] and [[Bob Marley and the Wailers]]. They are known for having a signature [[reggae]]-influenced [[pop music|pop]] sound.
